chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1867 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.7101/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. J.K Jarwar, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Malik Naeem Iqbal, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
